runnerFailure.message: Runtime.callFunctionOn timed out. Increase the 'protocolTimeout' setting in launch/connect calls for a higher timeout if needed.

boundary.durabilityFailure: No raw outcome or campaign checkpoint existed while the first job remained externally hung beyond six minutes. Both appeared only after Puppeteer's protocol timeout returned control to the host.
boundary.hostTermination: Termination was requested after the six-minute observation, but the host had just returned normally before the interrupt arrived.
boundary.seriesEffect: This is the first hard boundary. The machine-ceiling series stops here; 4m and 8m are not run.

postBoundaryObservation.reason: The old runner continued into job two because it classified the protocol timeout as a generic runner failure. Its immutable result is preserved, but a tuple is fully passing only when both scenarios pass before any hard boundary.
